{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "cmd.exe wrote a batch file to a temporary directory and then used reg.exe to set it as a logon script for persistence via UserInitMprLogonScript.",
  "indicators": [
    "persistence",
    "reg.exe",
    "HKCU\\Environment",
    "UserInitMprLogonScript",
    "temp directory",
    "batch file write"
  ]
}
